body:
Kofi, can you pull together the cap table summary for [Kofi Mensah](people/kofi-mensah) before the LP call tomorrow? Want to make sure we're all aligned on the ownership breakdown before we get on with [Amara](people/amara-okafor).

---

Wait, let me redo that — the mention is of Kofi, not a request to him. Let me write this properly.

---

[Kofi Mensah](people/kofi-mensah) do you have the updated cap table ready for tomorrow's LP call? Want to loop in Amara before we get on the line so we're all on the same page.
